records.question: Who are the users named Iron Man with email ts@richest.com, at least 6662425 followers, partition ID of at least 1, who tweeted "Hello I'm Tony Stark." on or after 2018-03-09 20:00:14?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE tweets.text = 'Hello I''m Tony Stark.' AND user_profiles.partitionid >= 1 AND user_profiles.name = 'Iron Man' AND user_profiles.email = 'ts@richest.com' AND user_profiles.followers >= 6662425 AND tweets.createdate >= '2018-03-09 20:00:14'
records.pred_sql: select user_profiles.uid from user_profiles join tweets on user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid where lower(user_profiles.name) = 'iron man' and lower(user_profiles.email) = 'ts@richest.com' and user_profiles.followers >= 6662425 and user_profiles.partitionid >= 1 and lower(tweets.text) = 'hello i''m tony stark.' and tweets.createdate >= '2018-03-09 20:00:14' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter user_profiles by name, email, followers, and partitionid, and join with tweets to check for the specific tweet text and createdate.

records.question: Which user profiles have the name Susan?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.name = 'Susan'
records.pred_sql: select user_profiles.uid from user_profiles where lower(user_profiles.name) like '%susan%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find user profiles where the name contains 'Susan', using a case-insensitive search with like, and select their uid with a limit of 5.

records.question: Which user profiles have the email ts@richest.com and the name Iron Man, with at least partitionid 1 and exactly 6662425 followers, who tweeted "My company is hiring interns." on 2018-03-12 02:30:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.email = 'ts@richest.com' AND user_profiles.name = 'Iron Man' AND tweets.text = 'My company is hiring interns.' AND user_profiles.partitionid >= 1 AND tweets.createdate = '2018-03-12 02:30:30' AND user_profiles.followers = 6662425
records.pred_sql: select user_profiles.uid from user_profiles join tweets on user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid where lower(user_profiles.email) = 'ts@richest.com' and lower(user_profiles.name) = 'iron man' and user_profiles.partitionid >= 1 and user_profiles.followers = 6662425 and lower(tweets.text) like '%my company is hiring interns.%' and tweets.createdate = '2018-03-12 02:30:30' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to join user_profiles with tweets to filter by tweet text and date, and apply filters on email, name, partitionid, and followers.

records.question: Which user profiles have a partition ID of at most 5, an email of np@superstar.com, at least 94375428 followers, and a name exactly Natalie Portman?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.partitionid <= 5 AND user_profiles.email = 'np@superstar.com' AND user_profiles.followers >= 94375428 AND user_profiles.name = 'Natalie Portman'
records.pred_sql: select user_profiles.uid from user_profiles where partitionid <= 5 and email = 'np@superstar.com' and followers >= 94375428 and name = 'Natalie Portman' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter user_profiles by partitionid <= 5, email = 'np@superstar.com', followers >= 94375428, and name = 'Natalie Portman'.

records.question: Who are the users with the email cd@superstar.com that have posted tweets?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com'
records.pred_sql: select user_profiles.uid from user_profiles join tweets on user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid where lower(user_profiles.email) = 'cd@superstar.com' limit 5;
records.thought: We need users whose email is 'cd@superstar.com' and who have posted tweets, so we join user_profiles with tweets and filter by email.

records.question: Which user profiles have the email exactly bw@superhero.com with no more than 35425845 followers and a partition ID at most 23?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.email = 'bw@superhero.com' AND user_profiles.followers <= 35425845 AND user_profiles.partitionid <= 23

records.question: Which user profiles have at least 23927492 followers, belong to partition 5, have the email cd@superstar.com, and tweeted exactly "I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks"?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.followers >= 23927492 AND user_profiles.partitionid = 5 AND tweets.text = 'I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks' AND user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com'
records.pred_sql: select user_profiles.uid from user_profiles join tweets on user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid where user_profiles.followers >= 23927492 and user_profiles.partitionid = 5 and user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com' and tweets.text = 'I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter user_profiles by followers, partitionid, and email, and join with tweets to ensure the user tweeted the exact text specified.

records.question: Which user profiles have tweets created on or after 2018-03-09 20:00:14?

JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE tweets.createdate >= '2018-03-09 20:00:14'
